label: Toolbar
summary: A raised strip of buttons with groove separators that wraps instead of hiding.
era: The Back, Forward, Stop and Reload strip of every 1998 browser window, grooves between the button families.

classes.name: rs-toolbar
classes.role: the raised strip; wraps, never collapses into an overflow menu

a11y: Buttons stay real buttons in the tab order; mark each separator aria-hidden, it is furniture. Overflow wraps to a second row, so nothing ever hides behind a menu.
